About RCEW
Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women (RCEW), established in 2002, stands as a leading institute dedicated to empowering women
through quality technical education, innovation, and leadership. Located on National Highway No. 8 (Jaipur–Ajmer Road), just 12 km from
the Jaipur Railway Station and 15 km from the airport, RCEW offers a vibrant, fully residential campus with world-class infrastructure.
The campus accommodates over 1200 students in hostels and provides convenient intra-city transportation for day scholars. Accredited by NAAC
and NBA, RCEW offers a diverse range of programs including B.Tech in
Computer Science Engineering (CSE), Artificial Intelligence (AI), Artificial
Intelligence & Data Science (AI&DS), Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE), Electrical Engineering (EE), and Civil Engineering
, along with
MBA,
MCA, and M.Tech programs
. The college focuses on experiential learning through internships, hackathons, research initiatives, and deep industry collaborations
to enhance employability and innovation among students. As a member of the IIT Madras Mentorship Program, RCEW students also gain the unique opportunity to pursue
the prestigious BS Degree through SEEP, benefiting from advanced mentorship and academic exposure from IIT Madras. RCEW takes pride in its consistent academic
achievements, with students frequently securing top ranks in RTU results. The institute boasts an exceptional placement record, with an average package of 8.5 LPA
and leading global recruiters such as
>VISA, UKG, UBS, Atlas Copco, Verizon, Infosys (HackWithInfy), SAP, Atlassian, Nokia, Igalia, AB InBev, Goldman Sachs, Comviva,
Philips, Microsoft, Bosch, John Deere, Aecom, HPE, Mahindra, IBM, Ericsson, Capgemini, and Directi
. The placement drives of 2025 and 2026 marked historic milestones with global
offers and prestigious internships from top-tier companies. With a strong network of 5000+ successful alumni excelling across the globe, RCEW continues to inspire confidence and pride.
Known for its innovative pedagogy, holistic development, and mission-driven approach, RCEW stands as a beacon of excellence in women’s technical education—empowering talent, nurturing
innovation, and shaping future leaders.
Management
Previous
Next
Misson
To Provide top-notch education and training focusing on theory and practical applications.
The curriculum could be designed to be challenging and rigorous while providing opportunities for
hands-on experience and real-world projects. We want to create a technical workforce to meet the
current and future demands of the industry. To recognize education and research in close interaction
with industry and emphasis is given to the development of leadership qualities in the students entering
the portals of the Institute with sensitivity to social development and an eye for opportunities for growth
in the international perspective.
Vision
With the noble vision, RCEW could create a supportive and inclusive community that helps women
to feel valued and respected. This could include providing networking opportunities, mentoring programs,
and leadership training. In addition, RCEW could actively encourage women to pursue engineering by offering
scholarships, mentoring programs, and other resources that help them overcome any obstacles they may face in pursuing
a career in engineering. We want to emphasize innovation and creativity in engineering, encouraging women to think outside
the box and develop new solutions to complex problems. We want to see every woman as a top community creator by creating a
supportive and inclusive learning environment and providing top-notch education and training; such a college could help women
achieve their full potential and significantly contribute to the engineering field.
Strategic Plan
Develop, strengthen, and implement academic programs that are responsive to the RCEW’s mission and are systematically reviewed for sustained quality, relevance, and excellence to meet the challenges of a highly competitive and global workforce.
Enhance institute infrastructure to accommodate the increase in intake, research, economic development, technology development, and transfer; contribute to an enhanced quality of life in the region; and facilitate sustainable domestic and international economic growth and competitiveness.
Promote and sustain a campus environment that supports a high quality of life and learning that positively impacts retention through graduation and produces knowledgeable and culturally competent citizens able to lead effectively and compete globally.
Improve academic interaction and participation of institutes/universities of national and international eminence to facilitate learning, innovation, and research.
Quality Policy
The RCEW team is committed to achieving quality as an integral part of the institution’s policy through continuous self-evaluation and striving to improve ourselves.
The emphasis is on innovative teaching, continuous monitoring, evaluation through tutorials, laboratory classes, and participation in co-curricular activities.
To generate social consciousness among the upcoming technocrats/managers to meet societies and the world’s challenges by accelerating ethics and value education.
Established in year 2002 Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women aims to enable the girl empowerment through technical education which will help students to unchain barriers to reach greater heights.

STUDENTS GENERAL INFORMATION
Welcome to RCEW, JAIPUR
Your Ultimate Destination for Brighter Future
We are NAAC accreted college established in 2002. We aim to empower girls
through technical education, which will help students unchain barriers to reach
greater heights. It is located on National Highway No. 8 on the Jaipur-Ajmer segment,
only 12 km from the railway station & central bus stand & 15 km from the airport.
The campus is fully residential with a hostel capacity of 1200+ girls with all facilities available.
In addition, the college has a transportation service at an intra-city level for day scholars. RCEW strives
for success through academics, which is fulfilled by its brilliant faculties regularly proving its mantel.
The testimony is a selection of its students in RTU academic TOP-10 each year.
Our cause & reputation is supported by top-notch MNC's & leading companies such as
Igalia , Ab
InBev, Goldman Sach, COMVIVA, Philips, Microsoft, BOSCH, John Deere, SAP Labs, AEECOM, HPE, Mahindra, IBM,
Ericsson, CAPGEMINI, Directi and lots more.
Admission Criteria
The eligibility criterion for admission in the first year of B.E. / B.Tech. is:
Passed 10+2 examination with a combination of subjects from Physics/Mathematics/ Chemistry/Computer Science/Electronics/Information Technology/Biology/Informatics Practices/ Biotechnology/Technical Vocational subject/Agriculture/Engineering Graphics/Business Studies/Entrepreneurship/Agriculture stream (for Agriculture Engineering) Obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects taken together.
OR
Passed minimum 3 years Diploma examination with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category SC, ST and Non-creamy layer OBC and Non-creamy layer MBC, PwD category only for relaxation in Minimum Academic Qualifications) subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.
Course Compulsory:
Physics & Mathematics

Campus Overview
We are RCEW, Jaipur and we provide the best Environment for students to thrive in the chosen field.
We strive to create the Hostel the second home for all students.
Lush Green and Plastic Free Campus.
1200+ Bed fully functional hostel
Centerally Air-Cooled hostel
OTP based permission syatem for hostel students.
24 X 7 Medical facilities.
24 X 7 Security with CCTV surveillance.
24 X 7 Ambulance Service.
Air- Conditioned hostel Rooms
GYM and Indoor Games facilities Integrated with hostel
24 X 7 Integrated Mess
Integrated Laundary Facility
Solar Power, Rainwater Harvesting and STTP system
Previous
Next
Facilities
Infrastructure
The sprawling infrastructure of Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women,
Jaipur has open space for Recreational activities.Well maintained classrooms and labs are a equipped with
various modes of teaching like LCD projectors,podium and green boards.
Gym Facility
The Hostel at RCEW, Jaipur provides the best facilities for all. The Gym facility is provided for the fitness of all students.
The gym is equipped with various machinery like Treadmills, Shoulder Press Machine etc.
Festivals in Hostel
The Hostel celebrates all types of festivals throughout the year like Holi, Diwali, Independence Day, Christmas, Eid etc. This embibes the feeling of zeal and enthusiasm in all.
Sports Facilities
The campus is equipped with all types of sports facilities. Basketball courts, kabaddi ground etc.
Our Team have grabbed top position at National level Competitions. Students also practice Yoga under special Yoga Trainer. Various Sports
feast are also orgnised in the Campus.
Wifi Enabled Campus
Students are provided with all technical facilities in the Hostel. The hostel is equipped with the 24 X 7 wifi facility.
Special Computer Labs are available within the Hostel as well.
Other Facilities
The Lush Green Campus is itself a paradise for nature lovers. The Hostel provides Laundary
Facility, Medical Facility, ATM facility and Canteen with hygenic and healthy food. The spacious Hostel Rooms are well
equipped with Coolers and AC.

Campus
RCEW campus is likely different from any other engineering college in infrastructure and facilities.
However, the college may have certain additional features and resources specifically designed to cater to the needs of female students.
The calm and scenic environs minimise the distractions creating a perfect atmosphere for knowledge acquisition.
The college may have well-lit and secure hostels with separate wings for each batch of students. In addition, the hostel may have
round-the-clock security
and female wardens to ensure the
safety and comfort of the students.
The classrooms and laboratories may be equipped with modern technology and equipment and may
have female faculty members who are experts in their fields.
The college may also have separate recreational facilities for female students, such as a gym and a sports ground.
In addition, there may be clubs and societies catering to female students’ interests, such as a women's coding or robotics club.
The campus may also have a well-stocked digital library, a cafeteria serving healthy and nutritious food, and a medical center providing medical care to the students.

Message By Chairman (CES)
Dr. Jitendra Singh Faujdar
The holy thoughts of our culture always inspire me,
and my focus on Learning should be based on doing things and not merely knowing things.
The whole process will remain superficial until learning solutions relate to real life
and motivate the learner to acquire and apply the knowledge. Any engineering institution
worth its name looks to optimize the productivity of global leaders. Our institution has set
specific objectives and planned activities for achieving excellence in all spheres of technical education.
The institution’s service in creating personally mature, professionally equipped, and service-oriented graduates
is worth mentioning. We strongly believe in academic excellence and do not compromise on teaching standards or discipline.
These three things are the springboards on which we operate.
Message By Chairperson
Mrs. Beena Singh
I am delighted that in 13 years, RCEW has become the destination of choice for aspiring engineers
throughout India. RCEW is committed to enhancing the capabilities and potential of Human Resources to transform them into leaders in their
chosen interests. With the concerted efforts of the Management, Faculty, Staff, and Students, I am confident that RCEW will scale new heights
of excellence shortly.
Message By Director
Dr. Arihant Khicha
Our Institute holds the pride of place being a pioneer in the field of engineering and technical education. We have been continuously ranked among the elite by our peers. Our constant pursuit of excellence has made our institute a focal point in technical education for students and faculty. At RCEW, we take care to groom our students according to the needs of the industry. We aim to actively assist students in identifying the individuals best suited to company needs and developing a successful recruitment relationship.
The sole aim of the Training & Placement cell is to make RCEW the center of excellence in the region and the nodal center for placement activities in this part of the country and beyond. Furthermore, with an increasing thrust placed on Institute – Industry Interaction, I sincerely believe that RCEW, Jaipur, stands to gain immensely from this symbiotic relationship.
Established in year 2002 Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women aims to enable the girl empowerment through technical education which will help students to unchain barriers to reach greater heights.

Welcome to Department of Computer Science & Engineering
The Department of Computer Science and Engineering at  Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women (RCEW), Jaipur   offers a dynamic and cutting-edge educational experience, preparing students for success in the fast-evolving tech industry. Our curriculum blends fundamental principles of computer science with emerging technologies like AI, cybersecurity, and software engineering. We are committed to academic excellence, practical learning, and fostering innovation.
With state-of-the-art facilities, strong industry ties, and expert faculty, we ensure that our students are equipped with both technical expertise and soft skills necessary for their professional careers. The department encourages research and collaboration, aiming to shape responsible, creative engineers who can contribute to global technological advancements.

Welcome to Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering
The Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) was started in the year 2002. Department has well qualified and experienced faculty members. Department is actively involved in conducting Conferences and Workshops periodically. Department has well equipped laboratories with a view to strengthen research & development activities.
Electronics and Communications Engineering (ECE) involves researching, designing, developing and testing of electronic equipment used in various systems. The Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering not only aims to make our students technically sound and knowledgeable but also to nurture their wisdom and make them a better and responsible human being.
The Department has U.G. and P.G Programme with about 100 students.
Prominent Labs and Research Centers :
Laboratories are extensively modernized to broaden the scope of basic learning and setups-
•	Research Lab
•	M. Tech Lab
•	Project Lab I & II
•	Microwave Lab
•	Digital Signal Processing Lab
•	VLSI Design Lab
•	Advance communication lab
•	Optical Communication Lab
•	Analog and Digital Communication Lab
•	Analog Circuits Lab
•	Microcontrollers Lab
•	Electronics Measurement & Instrumentation Lab
•	Antenna and wave propagation Lab
•	Electronics Design Lab
•	Power Electronics Lab
•	Signal Processing Lab
•	Digital System Design Lab

Welcome to Department of Civil Engineering
Civil engineering is a broad field of engineering that deals with the planning, construction,
and maintenance of fixed structures, or public works, as they are related to earth, water, or civilization
and their processes. Most civil engineering today deals with power plants, bridges, roads, railways, structures,
water supply, irrigation, the natural environment, sewer, flood control, transportation and traffic. In essence,
civil engineering may be regarded as the profession that makes the world a more agreeable place in which to live.
The department lends support to the collaborative project, seminars, workshop and also associates itself
in different consultancy activities like design, detailing, quality control, project management, etc. to meet
the challenges of both private and public sector projects. This department has made significant contribution in
removal of arsenic from ground water. The age old prestigious department has stood the test of time, to bring home
to the students, the scholar, the patrons and all concerned the fruits of development of Science and Technology and
to enable them to face any challenge anywhere in the field of Civil Engineering.

Welcome to Department of Computer Science & Engineering with AI
The Department of Artificial Intelligence (AI) at Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women (RCEW), Jaipur offers a dynamic B.Tech program designed to equip students with core AI concepts and practical skills. The department provides a solid foundation in machine learning, deep learning, data science, natural language processing, and robotics, preparing students to solve real-world problems through computational methods.
The curriculum emphasizes mathematical reasoning, statistical modeling, and data visualization skills, enabling students to design AI solutions, analyze data, and support decision-making. The program fosters innovation, critical thinking, and ethical considerations, aiming to produce graduates who can lead in AI-driven fields and contribute to technology and society.

Welcome to Department of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
The Department of Artificial Intelligence & Data Science (AI & DS) at Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women (RCEW), Jaipur offers a forward-thinking B.Tech program designed to provide students with expertise in AI technologies and data science techniques. The program combines core concepts in machine learning, data analytics, statistical modeling, and big data to help students solve complex problems using data-driven approaches.
The curriculum emphasizes AI applications, predictive analytics, data mining, and data visualization skills, preparing students to tackle real-world challenges across diverse industries. Students will gain proficiency in data modeling, data analysis, and decision-making through the use of advanced tools and techniques. The program fosters innovation, critical thinking, and ethical considerations in the field of AI & DS.
Graduates will be equipped to design intelligent systems, analyze large datasets, and extract valuable insights to drive technological and business transformations.

with latest developments in the software engineering field and can handle.
The department has excellent industry institute interaction and provides services like consultancy, design and testing to the industries.

Welcome to Department of MBA
RCEW Jaipur is offering Master Business Administration. This courses is career oriented courses.
In the view of rapid changing world of business, well qualified personnel are vital part to keep up to the pace.
As a modern business world has grown more complex and competitive, business administration has developed into a separate
discipline of multiple dimensions. Today MBA is the first choice of the students and we will open the floodgates of opportunities
for position of power and prestige in Corporate Business Administration and Management.
The full time MBA (Masters of Business Administration) program is focused on Management Systems and is designed to be completed in
two years. Apart from the specialized compulsory course in the focus area, the students have choice for functional area specialization
in Finance, Marketing, and Human resource.

Welcome to Department of Applied Sciences
We challenge students to develop attributes that lead to professional growth throughout their careers:
a sense of community, a sense of ethical responsibility, an expectation for lifelong learning and continuing
education, the ability to think independently and perform creatively and effectively in teams, and the ability
to communicate effectively both orally and in written media.
Upon graduation, we challenge our students to understand the fundamentals and the application of mathematics
and sciences, to have an ability to design, conduct, and understand experiments, as well as to analyze and interpret
data; to have a proficiency in the design of components and systems to meet desired performance specifications; an
ability to function effectively on multi disciplinary teams; a proficiency in the use of techniques, skills, and modern
engineering tools to identify, formulate, and solve scientific and engineering problems; an understanding of professional
and ethical responsibility; a proficiency in oral and written communication; the broad education necessary to understand
the impact of engineering solutions in a global and societal context; an ability to engage in graduate education and life-long
learning; and a knowledge of contemporary issues that have an impact on society and the profession.
Established in year 2002 Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women aims to enable the girl empowerment through technical education which will help students to unchain barriers to reach greater heights.
